title: The Masked Intruders
description: The truth behind the attack on Iceburg begins to emerge as the masked intruders and CP9 agents move in the shadows.
scene: Across pages 5, 6, 7, 8, this part follows Paulie, Iceburg, Nico Robin, Chopper, Franky. The truth behind the attack on Iceburg begins to emerge as the masked intruders and CP9 agents move in the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: We'll probably never know the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: We'll move away from the door.

summary: The truth behind the attack on Iceburg begins to emerge as the masked intruders and CP9 agents move in the shadows.
